title: Landowners' liability for expenses
doc_html:
§124.  Landowners' liability for expenses

The Register of the State Land Office may charge to landowners desiring a survey or re-survey its actual cost and expense, including the cost and expense of establishing or re-establishing the lines, corners, and half-mile stations and the cost of appropriate permanent markers, monuments, or witnesses.
doc_text:
§124.  Landowners' liability for expenses
The Register of the State Land Office may charge to landowners desiring a survey or re-survey its actual cost and expense, including the cost and expense of establishing or re-establishing the lines, corners, and half-mile stations and the cost of appropriate permanent markers, monuments, or witnesses.
